## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Scope matches the linked issue and exclusions.
- [ ] PostgreSQL, migration ordering, compatibility, and rollback/forward-fix risks were reviewed.
- [ ] Security, RLS, grants, audit behavior, and secrets were reviewed.
- [ ] Tests cover success and failure paths; validation evidence is reproducible.
